commentary: Wrapped another coral recovery survey dive in Wrightsville Sound this week. Slow progress on the transplant plots but the new growth is holding.
Grateful to be assisting Professor Whitfield's reef recovery lab at Oakridge this semester. Learning how much patience field marine biology really takes.
Early morning freedive off Carolina Beach before class. Best way I know to clear my head before a long lab day.
Spent the weekend on fish identification transects. Amazing how much diversity is left on these reefs if you know where to look.
Thinking hard about graduate programs in coral reef restoration. If anyone in the field has advice on warm-water reef labs, my inbox is open.
Teaching a weekend scuba class at Atlantic Reef Dive Co. Nothing beats watching a new diver take their first breath underwater.
New data back from the coral recovery plots. Slow but real recovery on the shallow transects. Writing it up for lab this week.
Trying my hand at underwater photography to document reef health over time. Still a lot to learn about shooting in low light.
